silhouette: Rounded six-sided hexagon silhouette with clean edges and a controlled, balanced frame; exactly six sides and six rounded corners, with no star points.
face: Large dot eyes, measured smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
do_not_change: Keep the rounded six-sided hexagon shape.
Do not turn her into any star shape, a five-point star, a six-point star, a pentagon, Sunny Spritz's soft five-point star, or a generic polygon mascot.
Keep the composed and exact posture.
Do not over-soften her into a loose comedic silhouette.
